/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/zlib/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/xz/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/bzip2/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/readline/lib CMakeFiles/plot_damage.dir/PlotDamageLocation.cc.o -o plot_damage  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libGraf3d.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libGpad.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libGraf.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libHist.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libMatrix.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libMathCore.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libImt.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libMultiProc.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libNet.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libRIO.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libThread.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.36.04/lib/root/libCore.so
